channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nationwide Transport Disruption as PSV Operators Strike Over Fuel Prices
item.description: On Monday, commuters across Kenya were severely affected as a nationwide strike by public service vehicle (PSV) operators brought major towns and highways to a standstill. Operators from major matatu ...

item.title: Malala Highlights Role of Educated Youth in Pakistan's Progress
item.description: LONDON: Nobel Peace Prize winner Malala Yousufzai expressed her optimism about Pakistan’s future, emphasising the role of the country's educated and passionate youth in driving progress. Speaking to G...

item.title: Kaduna Governor Approves Suleiman Sa’ad Abubakar as New Emir of Kagarko
item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, don approve Alhaji Suleiman Sa’ad Abubakar to become the new Emir of Kagarko. According to statement from the Commissioner for Local Government, Alhaji Sadiq Mamman-La...

item.title: Tanzanian Youth Encouraged to Access Government Financial Support for Businesses
item.description: The Tanzanian government has urged the country's youth to actively use government-backed loans designed to support small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). Officials highlighted that over 72 percent...

item.title: Andy Burnham Addresses By-Election Concerns and Economic Policies Amid EU Rejoin Debate
item.description: Andy Burnham, Mayor of Greater Manchester, has attempted to manage a political storm as he campaigns in the Eurosceptic constituency of Makerfield ahead of a by-election scheduled for 18 June 2026. Wh...

item.title: India unveils first bullet train for Mumbai-Ahmedabad high-speed corridor
item.description: India has revealed the first look of its inaugural bullet train, which will run on the Mumbai-Ahmedabad high-speed rail corridor. The display was showcased at Gate Number 4 of the Ministry of Railways...

item.title: Cyberabad Police Expands Charges Against Sai Bhageerath in Minor Sexual Assault Case
item.description: The Cyberabad police have updated the first information report (FIR) in the case against Bandi Sai Bhageerath, son of a Union Minister of State for Home Affairs, regarding the alleged sexual assault o...

item.title: Former GOP Strategist Highlights Republican Party's Ongoing Struggle with Trump Loyalty
item.description: Rick Wilson, co-founder of The Lincoln Project and former Republican strategist, highlights a fundamental flaw within the GOP: the party’s inability to reconcile principle with loyalty to Donald Trump...

item.title: PM Shehbaz prioritises well-performing ministries in Rs1.5 trillion PSDP allocation
item.description: On Monday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif conducted a thorough review of the proposed Rs1.51 trillion Public Sector Development Programme (PSDP) for the fiscal year 2026–27. The meeting focused on ensu...

item.title: The Life and Work of Model Sandy Brown in 1950s Fashion
item.description: Sandy Brown was a highly influential fashion model during the 1950s and 1960s, celebrated for her elegance, poise, and classic features. She became a prominent face in leading fashion magazines such a...

item.title: Kiambu Woman's Car Burnt in Githurai Amid Fuel Price Protests Over UDA Campaign Materials
item.description: On Monday, May 18, protests erupted in various parts of the country following a steep rise in fuel prices as announced by the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), bringing transport opera...

item.title: Family Requests Fresh Postmortem for Woman Found Dead at Marital Home in Bhopal Amid Dowry Allegations
item.description: A 33-year-old woman from Noida was found dead at her marital home in Katara Hills, Bhopal on May 12, 2026, barely six months after her marriage. Her family has accused her husband, a lawyer, and his m...

item.title: Ontario lifts restrictions on holiday retail openings, starting with Victoria Day and Family Day
item.description: Ontario has recently lifted the long-standing ban on grocery stores, shopping malls, and other retailers operating on certain holidays, starting with Victoria Day and Family Day. The change allows bus...

item.title: Tensions with Iran push oil prices higher and raise fears of economic slowdown
item.description: Global markets reacted sharply on Monday to ongoing tensions between the U.S. and Iran, which have disrupted the flow of oil through the Strait of Hormuz. Government bonds continued to sell off amid f...

item.title: Solar Home Systems Boost Mobile Money Use Mainly Among Better-Off Rural Households in Malawi
item.description: Recent research indicates that solar home systems in rural Malawi are significantly enhancing the use of mobile money, but the benefits are largely skewed towards households that are relatively better...

item.title: CAR-T Cell Therapy Shows Early Promise in Long-Term HIV Control
item.description: A small clinical trial has demonstrated that CAR-T cell therapy, a treatment previously used for certain cancers, could help control HIV long-term. In the study, researchers reprogrammed participants'...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues 7-Day Weather Forecast for May 19–25
item.description: Nairobi – The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued the seven-day weather forecast covering Tuesday, May 19, to Monday, May 25, 2026. According to the update, rainfall is expected to contin...

item.title: Pakistan Sends Troops and Jets to Support Saudi Arabia Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Pakistan imepeleka majeshi 8,000 pamoja na kikosi cha ndege za kivita na mfumo wa ulinzi wa anga kwenda Saudi Arabia chini ya mkataba wa ulinzi wa pamoja. Operesheni hii ni kubwa na yenye uwezo wa kiv...

item.title: Global companies face $25 billion losses due to Iran conflict
item.description: The ongoing US-Israeli conflict with Iran is already putting a heavy financial burden on companies across the world, estimated at over $25 billion and still increasing. Businesses are struggling with ...

item.title: Karen Nyamu Responds to Questions About Ex Samidoh Amid Co-Parenting
item.description: Nominated senator Karen Nyamu has stirred reactions online after taking a swipe at her ex-partner, musician Samidoh Muchoki. The two share two children, and fans have often noted the striking resembla...
